message:
fix(extensions): deduplicate version constraint fn + validation event tracking

Remove the duplicate check_version_constraint() definition that was
added alongside the original — Rust would have rejected this at compile
time due to the duplicate symbol.  The richer semver parser (^, ~, >=,
wildcard) is now the sole implementation.

ext_full_validation.rs:
- Track provider compat event state (default pass/fail vs per-mode)
  so aggregate classification correctly attributes provider-specific
  failures only when the default mode passes
- Add BTreeSet import for deterministic event tracking
- Add clippy::too_many_arguments allow on classify_vendored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
